primary_text:
Pet insurance covers emergencies. But it does not cover the care your pet needs every single year.

Vaccinations? Not covered. Routine consults? Not covered. Dental checks? Not covered. Blood tests? Not covered.

Best for Pet covers all of it. $50/month. Unlimited vet consults. All vaccinations. $250 off dental. Annual blood and urine tests. 24/7 VetChat.

Not insurance. The two work together.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: Insurance covers emergencies. Not this.
description: $50/month covers what insurance does not. Consults, vaccinations, dental. Cancel anytime.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
creative_brief: Two-column comparison. Insurance vs Best for Pet. What each covers. Clean, factual.
